descriptionParagraphs: Who says you can't teach an old dog new tricks?
Passive: Add a new Perk Group to this character's Perk Tree based on what is currently equipped in their hands, which is checked in the following order...
• Mainhand items: always checked first, giving priority to 'Specialist' Classes before Weapon Perk Groups.
• Hybrid Weapons: the character will be given the Perk Group they do not have, or be given one randomly from the applicable Weapon Types if they have neither.
• Offhand items: same as above.
• Unarmed: If no items are equipped, they will gain the Unarmed Perk Group if they do not have it.

•Armor: If armor weight is between 0 and 15 they will receive Light armor perk group. If weight is between 16 and 35 they will receive Medium armor perk group. If weight is over 35 they will receive Heavy armor perk group.
• If the character has all the Perk Groups of their equipped items, they will be given a random Trait Perk Group they do not have.
• When this character reaches level 15, the perk point spent is refunded.

Passive: • When being attacked with ranged weapons, gain 1 + 10% of your base Ranged Defense as additional Ranged Defense per tile that the attacker is away.

• If you're armed with a ranged weapon and a ranged attack misses you, gain a chance to fire back at your attacker. The chance is based on Ranged Defense.

• Additionally, Handgonnes gain +1 range.

descriptionParagraphs: 'Being aware of your surroundings can make or break a fight.'
Passive: • Has a 50% lower chance to inflict friendly fire. Stacks with the 'Team Player'.
• Knock Back will now apply Taunt effect.
• Knock Back, Repel and Hook skills have 100% chance to hit when targeting an allied character and will not apply negative effects or damage when used on an ally.
Active: • Unlocks the Taunt skill which forces a targeted opponent take offensive actions instead of defensive ones.

• Will also apply the Taunt effect which will make all enemies more likely to target you until the start of your next turn. Enemies will be more likely to target you by 15% for every 10 points of resolve with a maximum bonus of 150%.
• Costs 4 AP and 15 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: The bigger they are...

Passive: • When fighting beasts, gain an additional modifier that deals bonus damage based on the percentage of the target's missing Hitpoints. The more Hitpoints the target has lost, the more bonus damage is dealt, up to the total damage of the attack.
• When not fighting beasts, gain +10% ranged weapon damage but no additional modifier.
• Only works with ranged weapons.

descriptionParagraphs: A chant that gets the blood boiling, making your allies eager to fight.
Active: • Unlocks the Fury chant which grants all allies within three tiles of the Vala, including the Vala herself, a scaling increase in damage based on 5% of the Vala's resolve.
• Also grants a chance for allies to retaliate against attackers that hit them in melee range that is equal to 40% of the Vala's Resolve.
• Retaliation damage is scales by 30% of the Vala's resolve.
• This chants effectiveness is decreased by 25% per one tile away from the Vala.
• Costs 3 AP and 30 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: A time tested tradition of getting your opponent to the ground, disarmed and reeling!
Passive: • Grapple will no longer have a chance to hit malus. Any hit with Hand to Hand has a 25% to apply Grapple.
Active: • Unlocks the Choke skill when both hands are free.
• Choked enemies have their Fatigue Recovery reduced by 15.
• Damage inflicted is determined by the difference in Fatigue between you and your target.
• Hit chance determined by your target's Fatigue, 0% if they are fresh and 100% if they are exhausted.
• Hit chance is increased by +10% if your target is Dazed or Parried, +25% if they are Stunned or Netted, and +50% If they are Grappled or Sleeping.
• Costs 4 AP and 20 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: You used to dig up graves, now you're digging graves.
Passive: • Gain +12 chance to hit while using a Shovel.
• When taking Mace Mastery you will also gain 10% bonus damage.

• For other weapons classified as Two Handed Mace, you can get a scaling percentage of these bonuses, starting from 25% and increasing gradually to 100% by 5% for each level with the maximum bonus gained at level 15.
• If you are using a Shovel you will also receive the Knock Out skill.
• While using a Two Handed Mace, you will also receive the Gravedigging effect, which provides bonuses to Initiative, Damage and Resolve based on the amount of corpses on the battlefield.

descriptionParagraphs: The old gods have allowed you to wield their light.
Active: • Unlocks the Holy Flame skill.
• When activated imbues a tile and its surrounding tiles with the Sanctified Ground effect for two turns.
• Human allies within the area become Sanctified, gaining immunity to Injuries, Bleeding, Poisoned, and Morale checks when taking damage.
• Cultists and Undead become Consecrated, taking 10 to 20 damage each turn, and lose any immunity to Injuries, Bleeding, and Poison.
• Additionally, Undead cannot resurrect in the area while the flame is active.
• Costs 7 AP and 30 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: Use your armor's blend of protection and mobility to punish your foes' mistakes!
Passive: • Gain a stacking buff that boosts your Melee Skill and Melee Damage by 0.5% up to a maximum of 12.5%.
• You gain 0.5% when you dodge a Melee attack and lose 1% when you get hit by any attack.
• When engaged in Melee, the Melee Damage bonus is doubled, up to a maximum of 25%.
• If your Initiative is higher than twice your armor's weight (penalty to Maximum Fatigue), you start the battle with stacks equal to your armor's weight above 15.

descriptionParagraphs: All those years of studying ancient languages finally has a use.
Passive: • Allows the user to create Scrolls when given Cloth and Dyes.

• Created scrolls can randomly be one of the following: 'Scroll of .Nut'in', 'Scroll of Natural Talent', 'Battle Scroll', 'Scroll of Experience', 'Scroll of Training'. They will be a trade item, gain the user a Gifted level up, gain 50% additional experience for 3 battles, instantly gain 100-150 experience or instantly gain 1 training point, respectively.
• These scrolls will make the user Irritable but with a significantly lower day cooldown than reading a book or scroll. They also do not negatively impact how many books or scrolls you can read.

descriptionParagraphs: The spirit world is home to many malevolent beings, and the Vala knows how to contact them.
Active: • Unlocks the Malevolent Spirits trance which calls spirits to harass, torment, and weaken any target within seven tiles.

• The spirits increase the Fatigue use of the victim by 1% for every 25 Resolve, decreases their maximum Fatigue by 1% for every 5 Resolve, and decrease damage dealt by 1% for every 10 Resolve the Vala has.

• Each turn, the spirits have a chance to spread to additional enemies within two tiles. This chance is equal to the Vala's Resolve minus the victim's Resolve. The chance is halved if the target is more than one tile away.
• Chance to hit is determined by the Vala's Resolve and each failure increases her chance to hit.
• Costs 6 AP and 30 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: From small game to big bounties.

• When using Armor Piercing Arrows gain +25% armor penetration.
• When using Broad Head Arrows gain 10% Bonus Damage and cause minor but long-lasting Bleeding on any target you deal direct Hitpoints damage to with any weapon.

• For other weapons classified as Bows, you can get a scaling percentage of these bonuses, starting from 25% and increasing gradually to 100% by 5% for each level with the maximum bonus gained at level 15.
• The bonus will be doubled against Wolves and Hyenas.

descriptionParagraphs: With a well developed immune system and incredible fitness, a warrior's system can shrug off even powerful toxins.
Passive: • This character becomes immune to all poisons.
perks.searchText: Poison Immunity Other Other With a well developed immune system and incredible fitness, a warrior's system can shrug off even powerful toxins. Passive: • This character becomes immune to all poisons.

descriptionParagraphs: Unlock the deadly art of poisoning and be able to lick your poisoned weapon without dying.
Passive: • Renders the character immune to poison.
• Unlocks the Use Poison skill which allows you to coat your weapons with poison for your next four attacks.
• Poisoned enemies have their AP and Vision reduced by 1 per turns left on the status effect. It also lowers Initiative by 10 per turns left on the status effect.
• Base Poison duration is three turns.
• AP cost is reduced to 0 on first round of combat.
• Costs 4 AP and 15 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: Learn to use the superior reach of large weapons to keep the enemy from getting close enough to land a good hit.
Passive: • Each hit with a Two-Handed melee weapon adds a stack of Reach Advantage which increases your Melee Defense by +5, up to a maximum of 5 stacks, until this character's next turn.
• A single attack hitting multiple targets can add several stacks at once.
• If you put away your weapon, you lose all stacks.
• Additionally, while wielding a staff, the defense malus due to being surrounded by opponents is reduced by 3. If you have Underdog or Battleheart, this perk will instead increase defenses by 5.

descriptionParagraphs: Siphon their lifeforce into yourself!
Active: • Unlocks the Siphon skill which allows you to draw from the lifeforce of your victim and transfer up to 30% of their Hitpoints to yourself.
• You may not drain more Hitpoints than you are missing nor drain a victim to their death.
• Effectiveness is reduced by 5% for each tile away from your target.
• Chance to hit is based on Melee Attack.
• Costs 5 AP and 10 Fatigue.

• Additionally allows you to launch bombs and flasks with a Staff Sling.

descriptionParagraphs: Master fighting with spears and keeping the enemy at bay.
Passive: • Skills build up 25% less Fatigue.

• Spearwall is no longer disabled once an opponent manages to overcome it. Instead, Spearwall can still be used and continues to give free attacks on any further opponent attempting to enter the Zone of Control.
• Reduces the AP cost of two-handed spear skills: Prong, Skewer and Heartseeker by 1. Prong and Heartseeker no longer have a penalty for attacking targets directly adjacent.
• Increases armor penetration of Heartseeker by +5%.

Passive: • Reduces the Fatigue costs of Hand to Hand, Kick, Grapple, Choke, and Tackle by 25%.
• Increases Fatigue inflicted for Hand to Hand by 5 and reduce AP cost by 1.
• Kick has Daze chance increased to 50% and hit chance increased by 15%.
• Grapple now has a 100% chance to be disarm on hit and hit chance is increased by +10%.
• Tackle gains +10% chance to hit.
Active: • Unlocks the Tackle skill which on a hit knocks over your opponent.
• Knocked Over enemies have their Melee Defense reduced by -50%, their Initiative reduced by -70%, and increases damage they take by 25%.
• Hit chance determined by how Fatigued the target is.
• Costs 6 AP and 30 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: Corrupt the force sustaining one of your fashioned thralls

Active: • Unlocks the Violent Decomposition skill which causes a thrall to detonate destructively after the corruption has time to build. Affected dead explode at the end of their turn next round, dealing damage in a one tile radius. The less HP they have, the more damage the explosion inflicts. If they are killed before they explode, the effect no longer triggers.
• Only works on minions fashioned from corpses.
• Costs 5 AP and 25 Fatigue.

descriptionParagraphs: Each individual has a Warden spirit that follows their soul from birth to death.

• Automatically summons the Warden at the start of a fight. It can be beaten, but it never dies.
• The Warden's stats scale with the Vala's Resolve.
